caption: A man with a short beard, wearing a white collared shirt, speaks into a handheld microphone. He stands in an indoor setting with a bright, modern ceiling featuring recessed lighting and suspended black fixtures. Behind him, a large yellow banner displays an image of his own face and Tamil text including "நாரில்வது". Other men are visible in the background, including one wearing a dark suit and red tie and another in a light pink shirt. The man gestures with his left hand while speaking, moving it away from his body before bringing it back closer to his chest. He maintains a consistent position throughout the sequence, though his facial expressions shift as he talks. A small logo featuring a hand symbol is partially visible on the banner near his shoulder.
